# 02 — Show 404/expired page for unknown or expired sessions

Status: ready-for-agent
Labels: enhancement

*This was generated by AI during triage.*

## What

`EditorPage` navigates to `/s/:id` and renders the full editor regardless of whether the session exists or has expired. A user clicking a dead link gets a blank, fully-functional editor with no indication that the session is gone.

## Requirements

- In the `EditorPageInner` bootstrap effect (`EditorPage.tsx`), if `GET /api/sessions/{backendId}` returns a non-2xx status (404 or 410), render an error state instead of the editor
- The error state should show: "This session has expired or doesn't exist." with a CTA to start a new one (link to `/`)
- If the backend is unreachable (network error), do not block the editor — show a subtle offline indicator and proceed
- The check is already implicitly done in the bootstrap: `getSession(stored)` throws on 404. Change the catch branch to set an error flag instead of silently falling through to `createSession`
- For sessions where no `localStorage` entry exists at all (brand-new visit to a shared URL), `createSession()` would currently create a fresh empty session — this is wrong for the shared-link use case. Distinguish: if the URL's `sessionId` has no stored `backendId`, it could be a new session OR a shared link. Since there's no way to tell from the frontend alone, one option is to check `GET /api/sessions` by some lookup (not currently available) or to always create fresh and accept that shared links lose content on first visit until WS sync restores it. Flag this ambiguity in the implementation.

## Context

- `src/pages/EditorPage.tsx` — `bootstrap()` function; the `catch` at the outer try currently returns silently
- `src/lib/api.ts` — `getSession` already throws on non-2xx

## Acceptance

- Navigate to `/s/does-not-exist` or a URL whose backend UUID has been deleted → error message shown, no editor rendered
- Navigate to a valid session URL → editor loads normally

## Files

- `src/pages/EditorPage.tsx` (frontend repo)
